message:
chore(beads): update migration hint timestamp

Bump .beads/.migration-hint-ts to reflect the latest beads migration
state. This timestamp is used by the beads tooling to detect whether
a migration pass is needed when syncing issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
